title: epipactis stellifera
intro: Epipactis stellifera, also known as the star-tipped helleborine or stellifera helleborine, is a species of orchid native to parts of Europe and Asia. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Epipactis stellifera include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and aid in the treatment of various infections. Epipactis stellifera can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
